race.comment: BRAZEN SAILOR (2) is a lightly raced galloper who presents to the new yard on the back of a Class 1 win at Rockhampton last time. Well weighted with the claim and trip suits. Should be tough to stop. OUR SQUAMOSA (6) is bursting to win again with three minors from three runs this time in. Building a strong record over this course and distance and deserves a win. STELLA BYSTARLIGHT (4) went back further than expected off a wide draw last time but found the line strongly for second. Much better draw this time and expected to go close again. HIGHLANDS (1) was on speed and faded out of it in a run well below best last time. Back in trip and will find this easier. Can improve sharply. PRICE SHARE (8) wound up late last time and is worth keeping safe.
